---
lang: pt
---

# Prof. Washington Santos da Silva

## Bio

><span style="font-size: 10pt;"></span> Full Professor of Data Science and 
Applied Econometrics in the [Department of Management](https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br/mestrado) at [IFMG - Campus Formiga](https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br). Researcher at [Professional Master in Administration](https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br/mestrado).
